class.name: ASAbility
class.brief_description: Base resource for defining abilities within the module.
class.description: [ASAbility] defines the logic and data for a specific action. It manages its own costs, cooldowns, and tags.

method.name: _on_activate_ability
method.description: Virtual method to implement the ability's logic.

method.name: _on_can_activate_ability
method.description: Virtual method to implement custom activation requirements.

method.name: _on_end_ability
method.description: Virtual method called when the ability ends.

method.name: activate_ability
method.description: Starts the ability execution. Handles native costs and cooldown application automatically.

method.name: add_requirement
method.description: Adds a prerequisite attribute value required for the ability to activate. Unlike costs, requirements do not consume the attribute; they only verify the current value.

method.name: add_trigger
method.description: Registers an automatic activation trigger based on Global Tags or ASEvents. For example, an ability can be triggered when 'State.OnFire' is added to the actor.

method.name: apply_costs
method.description: Applies the costs of the ability to the owner.

method.name: calculate_ability_duration
method.description: Calculates the duration of the ability, considering [member ability_use_custom_duration].

method.name: can_activate_ability
method.description: Returns true if the ability can be activated (checks tags, costs, and cooldown).

method.name: can_afford_costs
method.description: Checks if the owner has enough resources to afford the costs.

method.name: can_satisfy_requirements
method.description: Checks if the owner satisfies the attribute requirements defined in this ability.

method.name: end_ability
method.description: Ends the ability execution and cleans up owned tags.

method.name: get_cost_amount
method.description: Returns the cost amount for a specific attribute of this ability.

method.name: get_requirement_amount
method.description: Returns the numeric requirement value for a specific attribute of this ability.

method.name: get_requirement_count
method.description: Returns the total number of attribute prerequisites defined for this ability.

method.name: remove_cost
method.description: Removes a cost definition for a specific attribute.

method.name: remove_requirement
method.description: Removes an attribute requirement by its tag name. Returns true if the requirement existed and was successfully removed.

members.member: Base duration of the ability.
Defines how the ability duration is handled (0: Instant, 1: Duration, 2: Infinite).
Unique name for this ability.
The unique tag identifying this ability.
If true, triggers custom magnitude calculation for duration.
Ability cannot activate if owner has [b]all[/b] of these tags simultaneously (AND logic).
Ability cannot activate if owner has [b]any[/b] of these tags (OR logic).
Tags of active abilities that will be canceled when this ability activates.
Tags granted to the owner while the ability is active.
Owner must have [b]all[/b] of these tags to activate (AND logic).
Owner must have [b]at least one[/b] of these tags to activate (OR logic).
Base duration of cooldown.
Tags applied during cooldown.
If true, triggers custom magnitude calculation for cooldown duration.
Array of native costs (attribute and amount).
If true, triggers custom magnitude calculation for modifier amounts.
Visual/Audio cues triggered on start and end.
List of effects applied by this ability.
Events dispatched when the ability is successfully activated.
Events dispatched when the ability ends (regardless of whether it was canceled or finished naturally).
Sequential phases that this ability will execute in order.
Attribute requirements needed to activate the ability.
Hierarchical sub-abilities that are unlocked alongside this parent ability.
Tags of sub-abilities that should automatically activate when the parent ability starts.
Automatic triggers for this ability (e.g. activate when a tag is added).

constants.constant: Ability triggers its effect once and ends immediately.
Ability remains active until explicitly ended.
Ability attempts to activate when a specific Tag is added to the owner.
Ability attempts to activate when a specific Tag is removed from the owner.
Ability attempts to activate when a specific ASEventTag is dispatched to the owner. This is the preferred way for reactive triggers like "Counter-attack on Hit".
